title: Irish Ploughman's Lunch
description: A light and refreshing take on the traditional Irish ploughman's lunch, featuring a variety of cheeses and cured meats.

ingredients.name: Mixed Greens
ingredients.notes: Choose from a variety of leafy greens

ingredients.name: Fresh Berries
ingredients.notes: Strawberries, blueberries, or raspberries work well

ingredients.name: Crusty Irish Bread
ingredients.notes: Perfect for dipping into the chutney

instructions: Slice the cured Irish ham into thin strips and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Slice the Ballycastle Smoked Cheese and Cork Apple Cider Cheese into thin slices.
Arrange the mixed greens on a large platter or individual plates.
Top the greens with sliced cheese, cured ham, and sliced red onion.
Garnish with fresh berries and drizzle with cherry chutney.
Serve with crusty Irish bread on the side for dipping into the chutney.
Garnish with sliced fresh cucumber and serve immediately.
